ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site where the rocket was launched */,
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rocket system used in the launch */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" INTEGER /* Time of the launch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the launch (e.g., HU, Success, Failure) */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of launch */,
  "payload_weight" REAL /* Weight of the payload */,
  "launch_cost" REAL /* Cost of the launch */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the launch video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_rocket_id FOREIGN KEY ("rocket_id") REFERENCES rockets ("rocket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "launch_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the launch site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the launch site */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rockets" (
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rocket system */,
  "rocket_name" TEXT /* Name of the rocket system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the rocket system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rocket system */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the rocket */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the rocket */,
  "thrust" REAL /* Thrust of the rocket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rocket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch the telemetry data belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the telemetry data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the telemetry data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the telemetry data (e.g., Celsius, PSI) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mission control, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch the user accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the launch data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the launch data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_tags_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry data the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sensor reading (e.g., Celsius, PSI) */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation result */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry data the validation result belongs to */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the data validation result */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)
